title: oxalis macbridei
intro: Oxalis macbridei, also known as the Yellow Wood Sorrel or Macbride's Wood Sorrel, is a species of flowering plant in the wood sorrel family (Oxalidaceae). It is used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include being astringent, anti-inflammatory, and having antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Oxalis macbridei include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and support immune function. Herbal preparations of the plant include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be made by infusing the leaves in hot water or extracting the plant's active compounds with a solvent like ethanol.
